title: Smooth Vanilla
description: BM'S Smooth Vanilla-friendly Modpack that works perfectly for you...
body:
# Smooth Vanilla
A Perfect Modpack For Play Minecraft. Vanilla Plus With Mods
## Performance Mods
**Sodium**: Replaces Minecraft's rendering engine with a much more efficient one, offering 3-5x FPS improvements over vanilla.

**Lithium**: Optimizes game logic and tick processing for smoother gameplay.

**Entity Culling**: Reduces rendering of unseen entities, improving FPS.

**FerriteCore**: Optimizes memory management to reduce crashes and lag spikes.

**Dynamic FPS**: Lowers frame rate when idle or in menus to save resources.

**ImmediateFast**: Speeds up entity rendering.
## Structure Mods
**Trek**: Designed for explorers and builders, it adds over 150 custom structures across biomes—buried desert villages, jungle treehouses, pirate coves, and frozen ice formations
## Shaders
Complementary Shaders: high standards of quality, and top tier optimized shader pack
And Some More included.
## Latest Version
The Copper Age Drop | 1.21.10
